entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Views: Is it possible to Select Single? (Part 2 of 2)
entry.content:
what point you are trying to make?

cds is mainly for data modeling(means what fields/structure you will have), not mainly for data manipulation.   sql is for the data manipulation.

entry.title: In global implementation Scenario how configuration is store?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a confusion related to SAP Global implementation, In the Global implementation scenario, where the global configuration template is saved or store if more than one clients are involved. How do we distinguish between local and global configurations?

Can someone through some light on this concept.

 

Thanks,

Kashif.

entry.title: Problem when opening add-on form in SAPB1.
entry.content:
When initializing the add-on, it creates new options in the modules menu, when clicking on them to deploy the form it does not appear, this has been happening to me repeatedly in SAP 10 FP2111 with HANA version.

The code I use is the following:

Public Sub LoadFormXML(ByVal FileName As String, ByRef SBO_Application As SAPbouiCOM.Application)

Dim oXmlDoc As Xml.XmlDocument
oXmlDoc = New Xml.XmlDocument
Dim sPath As String
sPath = IO.Directory.GetParent(System.Windows.Forms.Application.StartupPath).ToString
sPath = System.Environment.CurrentDirectory
oXmlDoc.Load(sPath & "\" & FileName)
SBO_Application.LoadBatchActions(oXmlDoc.InnerXml)

End Sub


It does not seem to give me problems in other SAP environments.
The error is solved automatically when opening any SAP window. Even if you leave the system log messages active, just by being active the error does not happen, but the correct thing is that no extra action is needed by SAP and the .xml forms are displayed without problem.

Has this happened to anyone and does anyone have a workaround for this?

entry.title: Re: Present multiple translated documents in a SAP Enable...
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

It's possible but requires manual effort.  To do it:

1. Create your original Simulation and generate the document
2. Translate the Simulation
3. Generate the documentation for the translated Simulation
4. In the Explorer view in Producer, right click the translated version of the Simulation and select Open Folder
5. Drag the PDF document in the folder, this is your generated documentation, into Producer and drop it onto the original Simulation
6. Rename the new version of the documentation under the original Simulation so it is clear which version of the documentation is which

Hope this helps.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Is there an API for cost accounting results in S/4 Hana cloud
entry.content: Added Finance tag.

entry.title: Re: Is there an API for cost accounting results in S/4 Ha...
entry.content: Hello, Could you check whether this CDS view is relevant: https://hub.sap.com/cdsviews/I_PRODUCTCOSTESTIMATEDEX Best Regards, Owen

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now Instant Producer - WerFault.exe error
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

Sorry, I've never seen an error like that from Instant Producer previously, however, occasionally there are errors associated with individual languages so it could be one of these.  I've also checked the Knowledge Base an cannot find anything.

Given this, it's best to raise a support ticket for this issue and get support to do a detailed analysis of the issue.  When raising the ticket, use the Component ID KM-SEN-IPR to indicate that the issue is related to Instant Producer.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: PRICE CONTROL ACCOUNTING
entry.content:
Hello,

Please share information on which app you are making the posting.

If it's goods movement, what is the movement type.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: 2408 release for SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Early Release Series
entry.content:
Sign up now for the 2408 Early Release Series

Follow this blog to receive notification of new series as soon as registration opens.

SAP strives to equip our customers and partners with valuable release readiness resources for each SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network quarterly release.

Early Release Series

The SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Early Release series of webcasts cover features planned for the upcoming quarterly release.  This platform, available to customers and partners, has a clear mission: deliver an interactive forum to engage with SAP product experts providing simple, direct answers to your most pressing questions.  There is a different session for each product area with content tailored for the specific audience:

  • Supplier Management & Risk
  • Procure-to-Pay
  • Source-to-Contract
  • Business Network

If you want to learn more and actively engage with SAP subject matter experts, we encourage you to participate in these informative sessions.  Register now!

Quarterly Release Communications

The release calendar for SAP Business Network  and release calendar SAP Ariba Applications identify release timing several quarters in advance.

Notice of upcoming quarterly releases will be communicated to Buyer customers three weeks prior to the release date.  Suppliers receive notice two weeks prior.  Releases are communicated via email notification (look for subject line starting with: Advance Release Notice).

Designated Support Contacts (DSC) and anyone from your organization that have chosen to subscribe to product notifications will receive these announcements. 

Where to find out more details?

On demand replays of webcasts from completed quarterly releases can be consumed from Release Readiness Resources: Webcast Landing Page

entry.title: Re: Unable to generate/open docx - SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

There is an issue with the setup of Microsoft Office that causes the documents to not be generated.  Please check the two KBAs below - the first is likely the one that defines your issue - to see if they can help you resolve your problem.

No document generated in Producer 
Author unable to generate Enable Now documentation 

If neither of these KBAs resolves your issue, please raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get support involved.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: UI5 – Navigate with Nested Components
entry.content:
Hi Kamit,

the important point here is that we are talking about a single "app" composed of multiple components. It is true that each of these components can be deployed as a standalone app but assuming your two apps are totally independent and therefore unaware of each other you can either use the facilities of some sort of wrapper app - I am thinking SAP Fiori Launchpad ( or whatever it is called now) - or simply construct a suitable URL to navigate directly to the other app.

For example, this link will take you directly to the "Category Detail" view for the Hoodies category which includes the "Product List" view showing just the products in the Hoodies category, all wrapped in the "Root" view of the sample app.

Thanks for your interest.

Cheers

Graham Robbo

entry.title: Criteria for evaluating suppliers
entry.content:
Preciso alterar a regra do critério "hora/período" no cenário de avaliação de fornecedores.

Preciso que seja a data estatística VS. Data de emissão nf-e, devido ao frete ser FOB.

Existe um BADI específico para isso?

O único BADI que encontrei foi MM_PUR_ANA_UDC_UPDATE_COUNT, mas não sei se ele atende ao que preciso.

Aconselhe-me por favor

Thank you for your assistance

Best regards,

Priyanka

Can you please provide your inputs if this is regardless of the release?

Here is the current version of the Solman systems:

SAP Solution Manager 7.2 SP08
ST 720 SP08

MSSQL 11.00.7507.02

entry.title: Re: Programmatic editing of sql in Crystal Report .rpt file
entry.content:
Any (non-ancient) Crystal for Visual Studio provides the RAS (RCD) API. No need for Crystal server.

What aspect of the SQL do you need to change? If it's just record filtering, there is a simpler way.

entry.title: Re: Signavio - While uploading Attribute file data is get...
entry.content:
Hi Kantrice,

We are not using SAP given process data management since for PS there is no standard template from SAP side. That is the reason we are using file upload method by creating log and attribute files.

My question is if we capture various details against case ID in multiple rows in attribute file, signavio reads and repeats 1st row details for other rows and not capture the details available in multiple rows individually. Is it standard behavior ? If yes then what is solution available to capture multiple details against single case ID ?

i.e. Case ID is with reference to project definition

1. Now when capturing multiple status against Project definition we need to create multiple rows in attribute file

2. Against project definition there are various WBS elements and network activities and to capture those details we will have multiple rows in attribute file. It is not possible to capture all details in single row per case ID / Project definition

Can you please guide on this.

entry.title: Re: Approval procedure using Query for 2 conditions UDF a...
entry.content:
Hi,

Try this query

IF ($[OPOR."U_EA_Item"]='Y' and $[OPOR."DocTotal".Number]<10000)
SELECT DISTINCT 'TRUE'

Hope this helps,

Son Tran

entry.title: Missing records in history (Sales Order Change Log)
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently using SAP B1 FP 2022

Background: 
I developed a program to track changes in certain fields (ORDR) by comparing the UpdateDate in (ADOC).
If ORDR.UpdateDate = yesterday, then I will compare the fields with the previous record in

 

SELECT TOP 1 UpdateDate FROM ADOC WHERE UpdateDate < FORMAT(DATEADD(day,-1, GETDATE()), 'dd.MMM.yyyy' ORDER BY UpdateDate DESC

 

Intermittent issues:
The UpdateDate or the whole history record on that particular date is somehow missing or "deleted" after a few days.
For example, my program traced changes on 10th May, which were recorded in my report on that day.
However, on 14th May the same changes were recorded again in my report. When I checked the (ADOC), the history record based on UpdateDate = 10th May has completely "vanished" from the database.
There is no record with UpdateDate = 10th May.                                

This issue was only spotted on a few Sales Order and happened randomly.
I believe the query is fine as it's (the program) been running fine for almost a year.
AFAIK this 2nd or 3rd encountered since the program has been running ever since.
This issue left me puzzled and clueless.

I appreciate any feedback and help from you. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation - RBSC portal "500 Internal Server Error"
entry.content: die URL funktioniert nicht

entry.title: Missing records in history (Sales Order Change Log)
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently using SAP B1 FP 2022

Background: 
I developed a program to track changes in certain fields (ORDR) by comparing the UpdateDate in (ADOC).
If ORDR.UpdateDate = yesterday, then I will compare the fields with the previous record in

SELECT TOP 1 UpdateDate FROM ADOC WHERE UpdateDate < FORMAT(DATEADD(day,-1, GETDATE()), 'dd.MMM.yyyy' ORDER BY UpdateDate DESC

Intermittent issues:
The UpdateDate or the whole history record on that particular date is somehow missing or "deleted" after a few days.
For example, my program traced changes on 10th May, which were recorded in my report on that day.
However, on 14th May the same changes were recorded again in my report. When I checked the (ADOC), the history record based on UpdateDate = 10th May has completely "vanished" from the database.
There is no record with UpdateDate = 10th May.                                

This issue was only spotted on a few Sales Order and happened randomly.
I believe the query is fine as it's (the program) been running fine for almost a year.
AFAIK this 2nd or 3rd encountered since the program has been running ever since.
This issue left me puzzled and clueless.

I appreciate any feedback and help from you. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Modify Entities Execute Action in RAP
entry.content: Hi @patrick_winkler , I've made some progress on our project and we've decided to adopt a new approach. Specifically, we're enabling the edit button upon action click. However, I've encountered a few issues that I need assistance with. Firstly, when attempting to update the data of the action parameter in the draft, I'm encountering an error because there are no existing entries in the draft. The error message indicates that the 'draft instance is locked and cannot be edited'. Additionally, I tried creating with draft functionality enabled, but received an error stating that the same primary key already exists. My main concern now is ensuring that when a custom action is triggered, the data is stored in the draft table. Subsequently, when I click on edit later on, I expect the data to be retrievable from the draft table. Your insights on resolving this would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDK Flexible Column Web View Second Column is not...
entry.content: Thank you @Jitendra_Kansal

entry.title: How to replace expired condition contract with an active condition contract?
entry.content: I wanted to address a recurring issue that our business team has encountered regarding returns credit note and their impact on our System. At times, our business team creates return orders against the billing documents that were generated at least two years ago. In these cases, the System automatically determines the expired condition contracts from the original billing documents to the newly created return order and subsequently to return credit note. Also, as these return credit notes gets settled in the previous month under the new condition contracts (using t-code: WB2R_SC), we have been observing a discrepancy. Requesting you to let us know, if there is any BAdI or a User Exit that we can make use of to resolve this issue.

entry.title: country template greece
entry.content: In S4 we dont have SAP country template for Greece, Croatia and Serbia, is any one aware of the process to activate or any leads

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Converting String to Date in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Priyanka,

As per SAP, this behavior is correct. We did the below workaround on the CDS side.

Use function DATS_TO_DATN for Date and TIMS_TO_TIMN for Time.

FYI -

3278347 - SAP Datasphere - ABAP Integration - Sending DATS and TIMS in native format - SAP for Me

3412699 - SAP Datasphere - ABAP Integration - Data Type missmatch when deploying a Replication Flow for date and/or time columns - SAP for Me

Thanks!

Regards,

Mandar

entry.title: Re: What address to choose in SAP Learning Hub subscripti...
entry.content: At least there is a workaround. However, it is still a much more complicated procedure than the old Learning Type subscription, where any private person could simply purchase the subscription using a credit card directly on the website.

entry.title: Re: Data Binding with Repeating Items and Simple Tables in Print Forms
entry.content:
hi Felix

just wondering if you have made the blog on how to overcome the bind limitation with script? could you please share the link here?

Currently I have a problem to show same table content on repeating master pages. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Programmatic editing of sql in Crystal Report .rpt file
entry.content:
Hi Peggy,

You cannot modify the SQL in the Report or subreport, CR hasn't be able to do this for quite some time, it used to be able to but it caused all sorts of problems so the function was removed. To many objects to make changes to for complex reports with complex data structures. So what Product did was add the Command Object, basically add your own SQL and then you can edit it as required, as long as it didn't break the report.

And before you ask there is no way to change the data source from tables to a command object, well maybe bit to complex, someone may be able to describe how to, without your data source it's too much to explain.

Here's the link for CR for VS:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

On that page is a test app, Parameter one, I created to get more info from the report like the SQL used, note you need to log onto the DB first because CR dynamically generates the SQL based on the DB connection.

How to use the new CR 2020 export to Microsoft Excel(XLXS) in Visual Studio .NET code (new)

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

As Ido indicated depending on what you need to change you can used the Record Selection formula to alter the filtering in the WHERE clause but you cannot change Tables or other parts.

To change your report from direct table connection to a Command Object Open 2 instances of CR Designer, open the original report and log in and click on Database... Show SQL Query and copy it.

In the second instance of CRD create a new report, log into your DB and select Command, paste in your SQL from the original.

Now you can drop the fields onto the report and depending on the formulae and other objects you may be able to copy and paste then onto the new report.

entry.title: Re: Fixed issues documentation for CR 13SP36
entry.content: Hi Patrick, I pinged them a week or so ago and they are still working on it...

entry.title: Re: Authorization Issue on Connecting Addon getting Error...

entry.title: Re: How to replace expired condition contract with an active condition contract?
entry.content: We are unable to replace expired condition contracts with active ones while creating subsequent documents like return orders, return billing documents, etc. It seems like during order or billing document creation, condition contracts corresponding to the condition types will be present in the internal table CT_CONTRACTS (change parameter of the method); however, condition contracts with an inactive state are not being passed into this internal table. For this reason, we are unable to replace the expired condition contracts with the new ones. We tried this using the BAdi WB2_COCO_DETERM_CHANGE_FINAL

entry.title: Unable to subscribe a tenant - does not exist
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to subscribe a tenant to my multitenant application but when I do so, it crashes and say that the tenant does not exists. I am getting this error from the logs as show below.

2024-07-19T03:43:33.18+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/0] ERR {"level":"warn","logger":"cds","correlation_id":"8aa8b606-e12a-4d36-4cf7-8d1b5e6d6cc7","tenant_id":"39b14c96-8e91-4a60-93c3-cb702b655934","timestamp":"2024-07-19T03:43:33.188Z","msg":"❗️Uncaught Tenant '39b14c96-8e91-4a60-93c3-cb702b655934' does not exist","status":404,"layer":"cds","component_type":"application","container_id":"10.32.1.5","component_id":"c5c939c6-7a3f-4a74-adab-b4fa525ff0eb","component_name":"demosaasapp-srv","component_instance":0,"source_instance":0,"organization_name":"3c2ee525trial","organization_id":"cf51f188-efe1-4907-a8b0-40c7ea06c3a1","space_name":"dev","space_id":"55cf897c-2ae2-48a9-b4bc-7f5f78d20acd","type":"log"}

2024-07-19T03:43:39.62+0000 [API/12] OUT Process has crashed with type: "web"
2024-07-19T03:43:39.62+0000 [CELL/0] OUT Cell d1cc041a-d5a1-41d6-b9f6-6cda736ce3f0 stopping instance f7acbd8e-6c97-4773-4ace-d1c0
2024-07-19T03:43:39.62+0000 [CELL/0] OUT Cell d1cc041a-d5a1-41d6-b9f6-6cda736ce3f0 destroying container for instance f7acbd8e-6c97-4773-4ace-d1c0
2024-07-19T03:43:39.63+0000 [API/12] OUT App instance exited with guid c5c939c6-7a3f-4a74-adab-b4fa525ff0eb payload: {"instance"=>"f7acbd8e-6c97-4773-4ace-d1c0", "index"=>0, "cell_id"=>"d1cc041a-d5a1-41d6-b9f6-6cda736ce3f0", "reason"=>"CRASHED", "exit_description"=>"Codependent step exited", "crash_count"=>1, "crash_timestamp"=>1721360619604239806, "version"=>"bc0c4fb2-7399-4d8b-9067-f1cb9b53aa28"}

I am currently using a trial account for my multitenant application and made a tenant subaccount.

 

Edit: When I try to test my application locally, I can subscribe just fine.

I would appreciate any help or insights regarding this. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content:
I'm afraid the solution didn't work, could you take a look and see if i've placed the "overrides" in the correct position?

{
  "name": "xsuaa-user-test",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "A simple CAP project.",
  "repository": "<Add your repository here>",
  "license": "UNLICENSED",
  "private": true,
  "dependencies": {
    "@sap/cds": "^7",
    "@sap/cds-hana": "^2",
    "@sap/xsenv": "^5.1.0",
    "@sap/xssec": "^4.1.3",
    "express": "^4",
    "node": "^22.5.0"
  },
  "overrides": {

    "@sap/cds": {

      "@cap-js/cds-types": "0.6.1"

    }

},
  "devDependencies": {
    "@cap-js/sqlite": "^1",
    "@sap/cds-dk": "^7",
    "@sap/eslint-plugin-cds": "^3",
    "@sap/ux-specification": "^1.120.14",
    "eslint": "^9",
    "rimraf": "^5.0.5"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "start": "cds-serve",
    "watch-user-test": "cds watch --open user-test/webapp/index.html?sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false",
    "undeploy": "cf undeploy xsuaa-user-test --delete-services --delete-service-keys --delete-service-brokers",
    "build": "rimraf resources mta_archives && mbt build --mtar archive",
    "deploy": "cf deploy mta_archives/archive.mtar --retries 1"
  },
  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "auth": "xsuaa",
      "db": "hana"
    }
  },
  "sapux": [
    "app/user-test"
  ]
}

entry.title: Re: Facing error while building and watching CAP project.
entry.content:
user: xsuaa-user-test $ cds-ts watch --profile hybrid
/usr/bin/env: 'ts-node-cwd': No such file or directory

I don't think I'm using any Typescript as i'm getting the above

entry.title: Re: Disable Object Page in List Report Developed in SAP C...
entry.content: Sir , I am developing in ADT Eclipse & I didn't find maifest.json file in the package . Is there any other way for Eclipse ?

entry.title: Re: Backdated postings in EWM
entry.content:
Please check SNOTE: 2574109 - EWM-> ERP: GI Date, GR Date and Posting Date 

If you would like to influence the dates sent from EWM to ERP side, For PDO related GI, you can use the BADI /SCWM/EX_ERP_MAPOUT_OD_CONFDEC method /SCWM/IF_EX_MAPOUT_OD_CONFDEC'~'MAPOUT. The dates are passed in the CT_BAPI_HEADER_DEADLINES parameter table, where you can modify the GI date. the relevant date is WSHDRWADTI which is the actual goods issue date  (constant /SCWM/IF_MAPPING_CONSTANTS=>SC_TT_OBDLV_GI_ACT).

Hope this note will help you.

EWM - Goods Movement

entry.title: Re: How to Hide sub screen elements (select-options) in m...
entry.content: Thank you It worked

entry.title: Re: How to Hide sub screen elements (select-options) in m...

entry.title: Re: Help Needed: Converting String to Date in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Thank you sir

entry.title: Re: smartfrom + print popup
entry.content:
Hi Madheswaran,

Please pass no_dialog = abap_true or 'X' so popup will not come for smartforms.

DATA(gs_control) = VALUE ssfctrlop( no_dialog = 'X' preview = 'X' ).

CALL FUNCTION gv_fm_name

  EXPORTING

    control_parameters = gs_control

    output_options     = gs_options

    user_settings      = space

  EXCEPTIONS

    formatting_error   = 1

    internal_error     = 2

    send_error         = 3

    user_canceled      = 4

    OTHERS             = 5.

IF sy-subrc <> 0.

  MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno

          WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.

ENDIF.

Thanks and Regards,

Gaurav Phadnis

entry.title: Re: Where to view credit memo created using BAPI
Radiobutton Event OnSelect does not work in SAP GUI for Windows
entry.content:
Hello,

the Radiabutton Event Onselect does not work for me in the SAP GUI for Windows, is that normal? (In the Slipstream Engine it works very well) (We have SAP_BASIS Release 750 and Personas 3.0 SP18 and SAP GUI for Windows 770 Patch-Level 15)

I could not find any restriction in the following note:
https://me.sap.com/notes/2080071

And is there a simple way to read out which radiobutton of a group is set without querying each radiobutton individually?

And is there a simple way to set a radio button depending on the “associatedLabel” property without checking each button individually to see if it is the right one?

The problem is that if I now extend the radio buttons of the same group, I have to include them in my scripts.
It would help me if I could loop dynamically over a group

Thank you

entry.title: Re: BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST RF05A-NEWKO Mapping
entry.content: The GL lines you should fill in the ACOUNTGL table of the BAPI.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to "consume" metadata extensions in SA...
entry.content: I have an freestyle UI5 app. And I was told that it's possible to show Fiori Elements inside the UI5 app. This could be achieved via MDE.

entry.title: Re: How to Create Maintenance Plan (IP01) With Existing M...
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the reply, but Issue got Resolved with Action(C).

Now I am able to create Maintenance Item(IP04) with BDC, but I want to create Maintenance Item with object links, please find the below screen shots with existing code (Which I am creating Maintenance Item).

DATA  wa_msg TYPE bdcmsgcoll.
**  DATA messtab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bdcmsgcoll.
  DATA:       messtab    like bdcmsgcoll occurs 0 with header line.
  DATA : bapimsg  LIKE bapiret2 OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE,
         bapimsgq LIKE bapiret2 OCCURS 0 WITH HEADER LINE.
  DATA : id   TYPE bapiret2-id,
         num  TYPE bapiret2-number,
         msg  TYPE bapiret2-message,
         msg1 TYPE bapiret2-message_v1,
         msg2 TYPE bapiret2-message_v2,
         msg3 TYPE bapiret2-message_v3,
         msg4 TYPE bapiret2-message_v4.
CLEAR:messtab[],bdcdata[].
  IF MAINTENANCEITEM-mptyp = 'PM'.

    PERFORM bdc_dynpro      USING 'SAPLIWP3' '0200'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'RMIPM-WAPOS'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                  '/00'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-MPTYP'
                                  'PM'.
    PERFORM bdc_dynpro      USING 'SAPLIWP3' '0201'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                  '/00'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'RMIPM-PSTXT'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PSTXT'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-PStxt.


    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RIWO1-EQUNR'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-equnr.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RIWO1-TPLNR'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-tplnr.


    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'RMIPM-GEWERK'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-IWERK'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-iwerk.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-AUART'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-auart.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-ILART'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-ilart.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-GEWERK'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-gewerk.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-GSBER'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-gsber.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-wergw'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-wergw.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-WPGRP'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-wpgrp.

    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'RMIPM-PLNTY'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PLNTY'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-plnty.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PLNAL'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-plnal.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PLNNR'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-plnnr.


    PERFORM bdc_dynpro      USING 'SAPLIWP3' '0201'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_OKCODE'
                                '=BU'.


    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PSTXT'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-PStxt.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RIWO1-EQUNR'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-equnr.

    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RIWO1-EQUNR'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-tplnr.

    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'RMIPM-PLNTY'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-IWERK'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-iwerk.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-AUART'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-auart.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-ILART'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-ilart.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-GEWERK'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-gewerk.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-wergw'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-wergw.

    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'BDC_CURSOR'
                                  'RMIPM-PLNTY'.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PLNTY'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-plnty.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PLNAL'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-plnal.
    PERFORM bdc_field       USING 'RMIPM-PLNNR'
                                  MAINTENANCEITEM-plnnr.

**    PERFORM bdc_transaction USING 'IP01'.
    PERFORM bdc_transaction TABLES messtab
    USING                         'IP04'
                                ctu
                                mode
                                update.
  ENDIF.


  READ TABLE messtab INTO wa_msg WITH KEY msgtyp = 'E'.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    id =   wa_msg-msgid.
    num =  wa_msg-msgnr.
    msg1 = wa_msg-msgv1.
    msg2 =  wa_msg-msgv2.
    msg3 =  wa_msg-msgv3.
    msg4 = wa_msg-msgv4.

    e_return = WA_MSG-MSGV1.
    e_retcd = '1'.
    CONCATENATE e_error wa_msg-MSGID wa_msg-MSGNR wa_msg-MSGV1 INTO e_error SEPARATED BY space.
    EXIT.
  ELSE.

    READ TABLE messtab INTO wa_msg WITH KEY msgtyp = 'S'.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.
    CONCATENATE 'Maintenance Item No'  WA_MSG-MSGV1 'created' INTO E_ERROR SEPARATED BY space.

      id =   wa_msg-msgid.
      num =  wa_msg-msgnr.
      msg1 = wa_msg-msgv1.
      msg2 =  wa_msg-msgv2.
      msg3 =  wa_msg-msgv3.
      msg4 = wa_msg-msgv4.

      e_return = WA_MSG-MSGV1.
      e_retcd = '0'.
    ENDIF.
  ENDIF.

 

Thanks

Satheesh Kumar

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to "consume" metadata extensions in SA...
entry.content: I guess this is the right way. Do you have a small sample how to achieve this in a freestyle app using Smart Controls?

entry.title: Re: Auto packaging in outbound delivery through abap code
entry.content:
Hi Daderiga,

the Outbound Delivery OData API supports the assignment of a free/standalone Handling Unit to an Outbound Delivery:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/588780cab2774a7ab9fffca3a7f919fe/27ca8a2be9924c76bdea2ab8536635e6.html

I think that you could use also the Function Module WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE_2 for your purpose by using parameter IT_HANDLING_UNITS_1.

Best regards,
Barış Yalçın

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Business One version 10.0 compatible with Wind...
entry.content: If you are only running the client on Windows 7, there is no risk to the database. If you run into any problems at all, it would be related to user interaction with the GUI or addons. For example, the print dialog might not open as expected, or the client could just crash when performing some specific action. Either way, it would not affect data or the database, as B1 uses transactions with rollback.

entry.title: Re: SAP Certified Professional - SAP Enterprise Architect - Preparation Tips
entry.content:
Hi @AndreasPoth and Colleagues , 

I am aspiring to appear this exam for the first time . while I start preparing for my learning journey, after some research landed here . I need some help and guidance to study the correct materials so that I can have good chance to succeed in the first attempt

1. is TOGAM ADM  best place to read from here https://pubs.opengroup.org/architecture/togaf8-doc/arch/toc.html?

2. IEA10 SAP Intelligent Enterprise - Architecture Foundation

3. all blogs posted here by colleagues https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-architecture/gh-p/Enterprise-Architecture 
 
Does above 3 points and content covers all aspects of exam below

Thanks in advance for your valuable feedback and time

 

Regards

Subi

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Typescript - Error - Could not find a declara...
entry.content:
Hi @sandeepmalhotra ,

the types have moved to the cap-js/cds-types package. So just install it via `npm i -D @cap-js/cds-types` and there you have all your types in one .d.ts file.

BR Tom

entry.title: Re: Displaying Customer Location with Custom HTML Builder Using RESTful Webservice and API
entry.content: Very Informative Thank you for sharing your knowledge.

entry.title: MSSQL DB restore for PO
entry.content:
Hi Team,
 
We have two PO systems running the same version of SAP NetWeaver 7.5 on Azure with an MSSQL database:
 
- PO 1 - BPI
- PO 2 - BPO
 
We are planning to restore the DB backup of the BPI system onto the BPO system. If we proceed with this restoration, considering both systems are on NetWeaver 7.5, are there any potential configuration issues that might arise on the BPO system?

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: MSSQL DB restore for PO
entry.content:
Yes, you can do that, but we don't recommend it.

This operation is generally only recommended for PRD systems to QAS or DEV systems.

Restoring a database backup from one PO system to another can be a complex process and should be carefully planned and executed. Even though both systems are running the same version of SAP NetWeaver 7.5 on Azure with an MSSQL database.

And please note that after restore, all data of the BPO system will be lost.

entry.title: Re: Quality info record in procurement - user status
entry.content:
@nzianiI was able to get access to a public cloud system and the "Manage Quality Info Records" app is the same as in on premise S4 HANA. This means that no status field is available. Can you share how were you able to access QI01 transaction in public cloud?

Regarding my initial problem - we implemented additional fields which are missing in Fiori app:

  • quality info record user status
  • manufacturer information in case of MPN

entry.title: Re: Tracking of Container Unit
entry.content:
Hi,

we are. Please check https://help.sap.com/docs/business-network-global-track-and-trace/transportation-planner-test-tenants/about-track-shipments-app?locale=en-US. 

Thanks,

 Ralf

entry.title: Re: Performing Regression Testing with SAP X Solution Man...
entry.content: Dear Customer， Yes, it is possible to perform regression testing on SAP Solution Manager and ALM systems. Both of these tools support the execution and automation of regression tests, as well as other types of tests. SAP Solution Manager offers several specific functionalities for managing and executing regression tests. It provides a test plan management feature, which allows users to create and manage test plans for various testing activities, including regression testing. The tool also offers test execution capabilities, allowing users to schedule and run tests, as well as monitor and analyze test results. Additionally, Solution Manager supports test automation, with built-in support for tools like HP Unified Functional Testing (UFT) and Selenium. These automation capabilities enable users to create and execute automated regression tests within the Solution Manager environment. In terms of integration with SAP systems development and maintenance processes, SAP Solution Manager is tightly integrated with SAP's Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) methodology, providing support for various phases of the software development lifecycle, including testing. This integration allows users to seamlessly link test plans and test cases to specific development and maintenance activities, and to track the progress and results of testing efforts within the context of overall project and release management. SAP ALM also offers robust support for regression testing. It provides a comprehensive test management feature, allowing users to create and organize test cases, as well as plan and execute tests, including regression tests. Like Solution Manager, ALM also supports test automation, enabling users to create and run automated regression tests using third-party automation tools. In terms of integration with SAP systems development and maintenance processes, SAP ALM is designed to work seamlessly with SAP's software development tools and processes, providing support for managing and executing regression tests within the context of overall application lifecycle management. Overall, both SAP Solution Manager and ALM offer robust support for managing and executing regression tests, as well as other types of tests, and are tightly integrated with SAP's software development and maintenance processes. These tools provide a comprehensive set of features and capabilities for test management, execution, and automation, and are designed to support the specific needs of SAP system development and maintenance activities. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Delete DMS Originals in latest version of DIR
entry.content: Please know that the "SAP Solution Manager" tag has been removed from this question. thank you.

entry.title: Re: SAP OABAP Programming using Test-seam and Test-injection
entry.content:
Please make use of standard principles for unit tests in OOP.

Your approach mixes productive coding with test code - which is a very bad idea and is kinda out of date.

Also this approach violates many (even all?) OO principles and clean code/architecture approaches.

entry.title: Re: Validation for BP reconciliation account
entry.content:
Hi @wwc0220 

The below blog might be useful:

Example of how to add a Validation with the Busine... - SAP Community

Thanks & Regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: Re: rImporting transports from production system to train...
entry.content: Dear Customer, I understand your requirement for adding transports to the import buffer of the production system (PS1) and then automatically adding them to the import buffer of the QS3 system before the actual import in PS1 is completed. To achieve this requirement, you may need to set up cross-system transport requests and use SAP Change Request Management (also known as ChaRM) and transport management tools in SAP Solution Manager. One way to achieve this is by setting up a transport route from PS1 to QS3, so that whenever a transport is released in PS1, it is automatically added to the import buffer of QS3. Then, you can set up a workflow or process within SAP ChaRM to trigger the actual import on QS3 once the import on PS1 is completed. Unfortunately, I don't have a specific blog or article to reference for this exact requirement. However, I recommend referring to SAP's official documentation on ChaRM and transport management, as well as contacting SAP support or consulting with a certified SAP consultant to help you set up this specific scenario. Additionally, you may also want to explore SAP Community forums or SAP blogs to see if there are any discussions or articles addressing similar requirements or use cases related to cross-system transport management with SAP ChaRM. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager 7.2 - Editing templates for System Monitoring
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: filter charm cycles based on system id where multiple...
entry.content: Dear Customer, I understand the challenge you are facing with filtering change cycles in the SAP ChaRM Administration Cockpit, especially when multiple development systems are configured for a single change cycle. It seems that the standard filtering options in the user interface do not provide a straightforward way to filter the cycles based on a specific development system when multiple systems are involved. One potential solution to this challenge could involve leveraging the backend data and performing custom filtering or creating custom reports using SAP Business Warehouse (BW) or SAP HANA. By accessing the underlying data model and the tables that store the ChaRM configuration and cycle information, you may be able to create custom reports or queries that allow you to filter change cycles based on specific development systems, even when multiple systems are configured for a single cycle. Additionally, you may want to explore the possibility of creating custom Fiori apps or custom dashboards using SAP Fiori or SAPUI5, which can provide more flexibility and customization options for filtering and displaying change cycle information based on specific development systems. It's important to note that making custom modifications or custom reports may require involvement from SAP Basis and development teams to ensure that the changes align with best practices and do not impact the system stability or standard functionality. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Connecting SAP Business Connector to Solution Manager 7.2 for monitoring purposes
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 20
entry.content:
• This week's SAP Developer News episode https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=36x8zgLzFak
  • CAP major release 🎉 https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/jun24 
  • "Good to know" playlist https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDZ18v94otZSJJrpcNkPPV9 
  • Creating and using a custom logger https://www.youtube.com/shorts/HaaG0PId4Os 
  • curljson https://github.com/qmacro/dotfiles/blob/main/scripts/curljson 
  • OData V4.01 spec - Addressing Entities - parameters as query options  (example 10) https://docs.oasis-open.org/odata/odata/v4.01/os/part2-url-conventions/odata-v4.01-os-part2-url-conventions.html#sec_AddressingEntities 
  • (Capire) Node cds.ql SELECT from() https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-ql#select-from 
  • Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs") https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/task-6-api-endpoint-with-payload-required-july-developer-challenge-quot/m-p/13765529 
  • (MDN) Tagged templates https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Template_literals#tagged_templates

entry.title: Re: Situation Handling - "Budget Threshold Exceeded": How...
entry.content:
Hi Simon, 

please check this blog on Help – Why don't I get a situation notification? 
There is a section "Have email notifications been set up correctly?" where to enable e-Mail notifications for a Situation Type in the settings.

- Axel

entry.title: Avoiding namespace in action call on ABAP RAP
entry.content:
Dear all,

To call an action in ABAP RAP the namespace has to be provided, for example:

/StatisticalKeyFigureHead('29999')/com.sap.gateway.srvd_a2x.ycust_api_skf.v0001.reverse
This is an action that calls the reverse action on StatisticalKeyFigureHead entity. Is there a way to avoid com.sap.gateway.srvd_a2x.ycust_api_skf.v0001?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Planned Delivery Cost of Purchasing in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi Qi_Liu,

Thanks for your post. Great information.

But I have a question. How to input a delivery cost for multiple PO?

For example: I have 5 PO and I buy this at the same time. I have a Delivery Cost like Z001: Delivery Cost, Amount: 100 USD for 5 PO.

entry.title: Re: Performing a Rolling Upgrade with HA and DR node for SAP ASE 16.0 Business Suite Application
entry.content: Excellent documentation Utkarsh !!

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub Subscription Purchasing Error (VAL_0101)
entry.content: I have been trying for a month now, have submitted four different orders for an individual Learning Hub subscription and despite apologies and promises from SAP still do not have my instance.  You stated that one must accept Terms and Conditions. The Terms and Conditions link brings up a pop-up that says at the top that you must click Accept or Agree but the only buttons are Print or Close - no option to Accept or Agree.

entry.title: Re: Need to set system status to inactive in LMDB
entry.content:
Hi Appuru,

Please check SAP Notes 1322696 - Work with Project Cycles where some systems are unavailable - SAP for Me and 2783899 - Lifecycle Status field help information on LMDB - Solution Manager 7.2 - SAP for Me.

Based on your SolMan version, either LMDB or work modes can be used to mark system is in maintenance mode.

Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Need Blob to text conversion in Data Sphere
entry.content: what's the data type of column "clustd", what's the target data type? if you want to convert binary to string, try function BINTOSTR

entry.title: Destination and Cloud Connector Configured, but Services Not Visible in SAP Build (BAS)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue with my SAP Build (BAS) environment. I have successfully added a destination and established a Cloud Connector connection to my on-premise S/4HANA system. The connection is successful, as indicated by the green dot in the Cloud Connector.

However, when I log into SAP Build (BAS), the green dot that indicates the active status is not visible for the system, and I cannot see any of the services to use.

Thanks,.

entry.title: DDIC_ACTIVATE error when installing SAPK-10S01INARBCI1 (TP_STEP_FAILURE)
entry.content:
Hi.

I'm trying to install the CIG add-on (ARBCI1 10S and ARBCI1 10S Support Package: 0001) (Tr:SAINT)  to link Arriba and S/4HANA.

However, I am encountering the following error in the installation.

I would like to know how to resolve it.

*******************************************************

Error message:

The installation was stopped, since an error occurred during the phase
DDIC_ACTIVATION, which the Add-On Installation Tool is unable to resolve
without your input.
After you have corrected the cause of the error, continue with the
import by choosing Continue in the queue display.
The following details help you to analyze the problem:

    -   Error in phase: DDIC_ACTIVATION
    -   Reason for error: TP_STEP_FAILURE
    -   Return code: 0012
    -   Error message: OCS Package SAPK-10S01INARBCI1, tp step "A",
        return code 0012

Job log:
Category ABAP programming error
Runtime Errors ASSERTION_FAILED
ABAP: Program CL_DDCMP_GRAPH_EXPANDER=======CP
Application Component BC-DWB-DIC

Information on where terminated:
The termination occurred in ABAP program or include
"CL_DDCMP_GRAPH_EXPANDER=======CP", in "_BUILD_NS_TYPE_MAP_4_USED_OBJS". T
main program was "RADMASG0_C3".

In the source code, the termination point is in line 163 of include
"CL_DDCMP_GRAPH_EXPANDER=======CCIMP".
include "CL_DDCMP_GRAPH_EXPANDER=======CCIMP".
Program "CL_DDCMP_GRAPH_EXPANDER=======CP" was started as a background job.

Regards

entry.title: Task 6 - API endpoint with payload required (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs")
entry.content:
This is a task in the July Developer Challenge - "Reverse APIs".

This task gets you to add another API endpoint to the plain "REST" service you have, but will be a little different in its definition, implementation, and how it's called.

Background

HTTP-based API endpoints, whatever the protocol, can differ in various ways, such as:

  • how they're called (which HTTP method)
  • whether they expect a payload (a body) in the HTTP request
  • what they do, what effect they have at the server side
  • what resource and representation they return (if any)

HTTP is an application protocol and there are already well understood semantic meanings for each of the methods (also known as "verbs", where the URLs are the "nouns"). There are some protocols that abuse or ignore these semantics, particularly the set of heavyweight "Web Services" from a decade or so ago, known as "WS-Deathstar" (due to their weight and complexity), SOAP, and even today we have GraphQL that arguably abuses HTTP as a mere transport layer. Yes, "abuse" is a strong word, but, as my bio hints at, it's an opinion I hold, and is one of many 🙂

Anyway, in addition to those differences listed earlier, one must also consider the duumvirate (yes, I did just use that word) of:

  • idempotency
  • side effects

Idempotency (from the Latin, as is, of course, duumvirate) essentially means "having the same effect". To quote the excellent MDN docs on Idempotency:

An HTTP method is idempotent if the intended effect on the server of making a single request is the same as the effect of making several identical requests.

Examples of HTTP methods that have this idempotency characteristic are: GET, HEAD, PUT and DELETE (yes!).

A side effect in this context means that in handling or otherwise fulfilling an HTTP request, state is changed on the server. HTTP methods that do not have side effects are known as safe. Examples of HTTP methods that do have side effects, i.e. that are not safe, are POST, PUT and DELETE. Examples of HTTP methods that are side effect free, i.e. safe, are GET, HEAD and OPTIONS.

Semantic meanings are important, as they form part of the "contract" of behaviour between clients and servers.

Why am I telling you all this? Because CDL, CAP's definition language that you use to define your overall CDS model, has a couple of keywords that are important in this context.

Actions and functions

In Capire's section on Providing Services, there's a subsection on Actions & Functions that explain more. I recommend you go and read that section, then come back here.

Did you notice the explanation was in the context of OData? That's because it's where the specific definitions originate, but these definitions make sense even outside the context of OData, such as when serving via the "REST" protocol.

In summary, we can see that both actions and functions are for providing API endpoints that represent resources beyond the standard CRUD+Q requests, although:

  • Functions are for defining API endpoints that are safe, these endpoints are to be requested with HTTP GET, and any data should be supplied in the URL. There's a related rule here that functions must be addressed (in the URL) with brackets, even if there's no data to supply. Functions, on the whole, are for returning data.
  • Actions are for defining API endpoints that may have side effects, and these endpoints must be requested with HTTP POST; any data that is to be supplied must be as a payload to the POST request. In addition, actions may return nothing (just an HTTP status code and headers).

In addition (but not relevant for this task), both functions and actions can be bound or unbound. The idea of "unbound" is what we generally think of in terms of simple API endpoints. The "bound" concept is from OData, and is about calling an action or function relative to a specific entity. In such cases there's an extra implicit "binding parameter" that the implementation receives in the request, as a connection to the instance of the entity to which the called function is bound.

The first task in the context of this current plain "REST" service was an unbound function (note the brackets, despite no parameters):

/rest/plain/theAnswer()
This task will require you to define and implement a simple unbound action, which means you must:
  • use the action keyword
  • call it using a request with the HTTP POST method
  • send the data in the payload of the request

You will also not need to use brackets at the end of the URL.

The requirements

Here are the specific requirements for this task.

In the plain service you have already, define an unbound action that expects a list of integers. The implementation of that unbound action must determine the highest of those numbers, and return it as a single integer.

Submitting to the TESTER

Now you're ready to submit your CANDIDATE service, with this new API endpoint, to the TESTER!

Note that the TESTER will be calling your action via HTTP POST, and supplying the list of integers as an array, in a JSON representation, in other words, like this:

POST /rest/plain/highestValue HTTP/1.1
Host: localhost:8000
Content-Type: application/json
Content-Length: 19

[54, 203, -3, 0, 1]

The payload

The task identifier you need to supply in the payload of your submission is: plain-highestValue.

You'll have already done this sort of thing previously so just head back there for the more detailed instructions if you need them, or to the the section titled "The Tester service, and making a test request" in the main challenge blog post.

You'll need to submit a JSON payload like this:

{
  "communityid": "<your-community-id>",
  "serviceurl": "<the-URL-of-your-service>",
  "task": "plain-highestValue"
}
And, just as with the previous (and all further tasks):

  • the value for the communityid property should be your ID on this SAP Community platform (e.g. mine is "qmacro")

  • the value for the serviceurl property should be the absolute URL (i.e. including the scheme), of your CANDIDATE service which contains the API endpoint (see ℹ️ A note on URLs and services).

That's it!

Logging of test results

Remember that you can check on your progress, and the progress of your fellow participants - all requests are logged and are available in an entity set served by the TESTER service. The entity set URL is https://developer-challenge-2024-07.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/tester/Testlog and being an OData V4 entity set, all the normal OData system query options are available to you for digging into that information.

Until the next task, have fun, and if you have any questions or comments, leave them below!

entry.title: IPS Sync Issue : S/4HANA Cloud Private edition User and Roles Sync
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to sync the users and their roles from SAP S/4Hana Cloud, Private Edition to Work Zone (standard) using IPS sync. 

We've followed the below process by referring the help documents. 

  • Configure the Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal
  • SAP Application Server ABAP | SAP Help Portal
  • Configure Identity Provisioning Service | SAP Help Portal

However, while performing the sync we're getting issue "Initialization of repository destination <destination_name> Failed: No user identity is configured". 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition version : 2022 

Steps Followed: 

1. Established the cloud connector setup with BTP Subaccount 

2. Subscribed the SAP Identity service, connectivity plan to BTP subaccount based on IAS region

3. Created a dedicated destination with "RFC" as connection type with cloud connector information and checked the connection 

4. Created Source system with type "SAP Application Server ABAP" and selected the destination (point3).

5. Created target system with type "SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition" 

6. Performed the Read / Resync action from the Source system. 

 

Thanks.

entry.title: OM Hierarchy
entry.content:
I was assigned the task of creating a hierarchy where the Finance Manager is at the top, supervising the Assistant Finance Manager, and subsequently, the Finance Manager is the line supervisor of the Finance Officer. I have created the positions and defined the relationships accordingly, but the Finance Officer is not appearing in the reporting structure.

Spoiler

entry.title: Re: No check on foreign key in ADT-defined database table
entry.content: So this means foreign key relationships are exclusively modelled in views when using RAP, not on database level?

entry.title: Re: The 1H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Release Highlights
entry.content: Informative blog

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano ,

I am a SAP SD Consultant. 

And I'm so interest in participating in the digital skills initiative. Hope to receive the respond from you soon.

entry.title: Re: Deploying App using ABAP CDS Annotations
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: How to set the Inspection Lot in Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
I wonder how to set Inspection Lot in Digital Manufacturing.
If you look at the Manage Order, there is Inspection Lot, which is indicated as an empty value.
I think the information is coming from ERP, is there any way to create Inspection Lot directly from Digital Manufacturing?

Is there any way to POST using APi?

entry.title: Re: Tracking of material consumption in Quality Testing through QM Order
entry.content: Hi Tejas,

entry.title: Re: Tracking of material consumption in Quality Testing t...
entry.content:
Hi Tejas,

Please check the feature of 'Destructive Sampling', which would meet the business requirement.

Regards,

Raghavendra

entry.title: Re: How do I create two my inboxes for two systems.
entry.content: Hi maybe you can try to build up two 'My Inbox' app tile in different role, then you following this blog to assign the role to different system aliases. https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/fiori-app-with-multiple-backend-systems/ba-p/13152536

entry.title: Multiple FU's are not created for the sales order
entry.content:
I created two orders 10003619 and 10003648.
For the order 10003620 – I used different SH parties on the same day for two materials and the document flow shows four FU’s as expected.
For the other 10003648 – I used different SH parties in the line item level with different dates and also I maintained the delivery group “01”  for both the line items in the header level but when I’m checking the FU’s its showing only one FU without splitting the quantity. So, basically the item has to be split with respective of the different SH parties/ Split criteria right? Please correct me if I’m wrong.

My FUBR is having the consolidate as much as possible and item split tick marked.

Split criteria – 4 , Rounding – 1

My expectation is for the order 10003648 - It should be create 4 FU's

entry.title: Re: Disable Object Page in List Report Developed in SAP C...
entry.content: How do you run the fiori elements app? Preview from in eclipse I guess? You have to generate a list report in BAS and then you can apply the changes mentioned.

entry.title: Re: Seasonal Maintenance strategy
entry.content:
Greetings.

Perhaps you can implement two maintenance plans:

  • one for monthly
  • one for three months packages

You could try with one but I think package hierarchy would not suffice to achieve this. In second step include these plans in separate IP30 variants and in third step define system job or a program do call the IP30 according to your calendar.

Best regards, Matjaž.
